---
title: G. Preflight + boot
---

Run the preflight check with `make doctor`, start the stack with `make up`, and
open the submission UI in your browser.

::: {.callout-note}
## Coming soon
This page is part of the manual's skeleton. Its content is being written in
[issue #12](https://github.com/JeroenUMC/bp-sweden-web/issues/12).
:::
